column2: 1.How often do you exercise in a typical week?
column3: 2. What is your main fitness goal?
column4: 3. Where do you usually work out?
column5: 4. How long are your average workout sessions?
column6: 5.  What type of exercise do you prefer the most?
column7: 6. Do you follow a structured workout routine or plan?
column8: 7. How would you rate your current fitness level?
column9: 8. What is your biggest challenge in maintaining a fitness routine?
column10: 9. Do you track your fitness progress?
column11: 10. If yes, what do you use to track progress?
column12: 11. Do you follow any specific diet or eating plan?
column13: 12. How important is nutrition to your fitness goals?
column14: 13.  How motivated do you feel about exercising on most days?
column15: 14.  Has exercise improved your mental or emotional well-being?
column16: 15. What is one thing that would help you improve your fitness routine?
column17: 16. How do you typically stay motivated to work out?
column18: 17. Do you use any fitness technology (apps, wearables, etc.)?
column19: 18.  If yes, which fitness apps or devices do you use?
column20: 19.  Do you feel that your fitness routine is balanced (cardio, strength, flexibility, etc.)?
column21: 20.  Would you be willing to pay for a personal trainer or fitness coach?
